title: Custom Vanilla Trees
description: A mod that adds new beautiful trees and some foliage.
body:
![CUSTOM TREES AND FOLIAGE FOR MINECRAFT](https://i.imgur.com/Bzr86y5.png)

This mod replaces most of the vanilla trees by custom ones via the structure-feature elements but does not add custom blocks. The mod also doesnt replace vanilla trees that appear when using bonemeal on saplings to make farming trees easier because the custom trees mostly dont have much wood in their block palette. 

The trees that are replaced are the following:

- swamp trees
- jungle trees
- dark oak trees
- spruce trees
- birch trees
- bonsai trees

Trees that are **not** replaced:

- crimson and warped trees
- pale oak trees
- oak trees

it also adds some foliage elements like leaves and grass patches, as well as mud patches in swamp biomes. 

The mod is made for all people that wish for new trees and are somewhat unhappy with the ones vanilla minecraft currently has. 



﻿special thanks to the team of mcreator that made this mod possible

ITS RECOMMENDED TO USE THE LARGE BIOME SELECTION AS WELL AS THE BONUS CHEST THAT CONTAINS ALL VANILLA SAPLINGS
